rationale: Section 26 prohibits death and transfer taxes, not ad valorem property taxes. Subsection (b)(3) expressly excludes ad valorem taxes from its scope, so a homestead exemption increase is unaffected.
quote: (3) an ad valorem tax on property.
_note: Tex. Const. art. VIII, §26 concerns death/transfer taxes only; homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b) are ad valorem property tax provisions outside its scope.
